summary: Frontend E2E testing of iter181 Marketplace AI Image (Nano Banana) — 23/23 assertions PASSED. Login via API bypass, marketplace create-product form opens, AI button (product-ai-image-btn) opens modal (ai-image-modal), quota '0/3 — 3 restantes' renders, all 3 tabs (generate/enhance/bgswap) switch correctly with their panes, 7 bg presets loaded in dropdown. Real Nano Banana generate call with prompt 'minimal coffee mug' completed in ~30s, ai-preview rendered, accept/redo buttons appeared, quota live-updated to '1/3 — 2 restantes', clicking 'Utiliser cette image' (ai-accept-btn) closed modal and appended image to productImages (visible as product-image-preview-0 thumbnail with toast '✨ Image IA ajoutée au produit'). Manual upload (product-image-add) still visible/independent. Backend skipped per request (8/8 already PASS).

issues: Cosmetic: rendered text 'Quota du jour : 0/33 restantes' — two adjacent <span> nodes are visually concatenated without separator (the '3 3' looks like '33'). Consider adding a • or | between '0/3' and '3 restantes' for clarity, or wrapping the second span with a leading space/dot.

action_items: (Optional polish) Add visual separator between used/quota and remaining badges in ai-quota to avoid '0/33 restantes' visual ambiguity.
critical_code_review_comments: ServicesPage.js is now 1164 lines — approaching the 700-line guideline; AIImageModal (lines 928–1163, ~235 lines) is a strong candidate for extraction into /components/marketplace/AIImageModal.js for maintainability.
ai-quota visual: two spans concatenated without separator look like '0/33 restantes' (cosmetic only).
All required data-testid attributes are present and stable. No accessibility regressions detected.
seed_data_creation: 1 successful AI generation consumed (quota now 1/3 for Bob today). No persistent product was created (form only filled with image, not submitted).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend AI image flow fully validated. Bob's marketplace_ai_image_usage row exists for today with count=1; if re-running tests, either DELETE FROM marketplace_ai_image_usage WHERE user_id=<bob_id> to reset, or rely on remaining 2/3 quota. The TabBtn component exposes data-testid=ai-tab-{generate|enhance|bgswap} — use those (not text selectors with emojis). Login via fetch /api/auth/login with captcha bypass works cleanly and avoids the captcha widget.
